subcodes.first_line: O My Pen! Make mention of him who hath turned unto the Ocean of Utterance, when there appeared at the Most Exalted Horizon this Name whereby [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا قلمی ان اذکر من اقبل الی بحر البیان اذ ظهر الافق الاعلی بهذا الاسم الذی به
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @Primal Will and the Word; Remembrance; Manifestation of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
